title: Filter subitems' based on due date - example: "next week" subitems
excerpt:
Target: have a table with “next week” subitems filtered.

How I tried: 

add date column to subitems
mark finish date on that column (due date)
create new table
filter new table based on subitem’s due date as "next week…

posts.author: Gab (Gabriel Velian)
posts.cookedHtml:
• Target: have a table with “next week” subitems filtered.

How I tried:

  • add date column to subitems
  • mark finish date on that column (due date)
  • create new table
  • filter new table based on subitem’s due date as "next week"subitems

Surprise:

  • date column is visible on the filter only from Item level… not subitems level. I can not highlight subitems “next week” finish…only the whole Item (also Item has a due date column).
